info.title: Quantyra GeoIDX API
info.description: OpenAPI document for the **idx-api** Go service (Fiber): PAT auth, versioned Bridge/Spark MLS proxy (`/api/v1/*`), GIS parcel GeoJSON, hybrid search, comps engine, replication stats, and listing photos (`/images/*`). This collection covers JSON/API endpoints only and intentionally excludes HTML/session dashboard pages (`/login`, `/dashboard/*`, `/invite/*`) plus static assets (`/static/*`). Routes are registered in `internal/api/routes.go` and `internal/handler/dashboard/handler.go`.

servers.description: Production (`IDX_PLATFORM_URL` / `IDX_API_PUBLIC_URL` — API and dashboard on the platform host)
Local Go API (`make run-api` or `go run ./cmd/api`, default port 8000)

tags.name: Infrastructure
tags.description: Health, readiness, and metrics endpoints. No authentication required.

tags.name: MLS Data - Agents & Offices
tags.description: Agents, offices, and RESO office resources.

tags.name: MLS Data - Open Houses
tags.description: Open house collections and RESO open house resources.

tags.name: MLS Data - Public Records
tags.description: Public parcels, assessments, and transactions under `/api/v1/pub/*`.

tags.name: MLS Data - Search
tags.description: `POST /api/v1/search` hybrid PostGIS + live RESO search. See `docs/idx-api-bridge-proxy.md#search-endpoint-post-apiv1search` for field list, aliases, and parsing rules.

tags.name: Comps Engine
tags.description: `POST /api/v1/comps/run` comparables, investor modes, BPO, and home value.

tags.name: GIS Parcel Proxy
tags.description: `GET /api/v1/gis`, MLS-scoped GIS, and `GET /api/v1/gis/autocomplete/*` city/county suggestions (requires migration 00007 `pg_trgm`).

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Operator-only endpoints guarded by dashboard session (`SessionAuthMiddleware`). Requires a valid session cookie from `POST /login`.

tags.name: Images
tags.description: Streaming Bridge/Spark listing photos through the API (same auth as Bridge JSON). Actual path prefix: `/images/` (not `/api/images/`).

bearerAuth.description: Bearer PAT on routes guarded by `DomainToken` middleware (`/api/v1/*`, `/images/*`). Abilities: **`idx:full`** (issued by `POST /api/auth/token`) or **`idx:access`**. Always pair with `domainSlugAuth` (`X-Domain-Slug` header) or the `?domain=` query parameter.

domainSlugAuth.name: X-Domain-Slug
domainSlugAuth.description: TXT-verified domain slug required alongside `bearerAuth` for all DomainToken-protected routes (`/api/v1/*`, `/images/*`). Must match a verified domain on the token owner's account. The `?domain=` query parameter is an equivalent alternative accepted by the same middleware. Not required for `/api/auth/user` (token-only) or admin session endpoints.

token.description: Plaintext API token (SHA-256 stored). Use as `Bearer <token>` in Authorization header.

ListingsResponse.description: Bridge Data Output web API envelope for GET /api/v1/listings (not OData `value`). RESO OData routes use a separate shape.

pricing.description: Global quote matrix used for listing-level conversion output (when include_pricing=1).

bundle.description: Listing objects from Bridge web API.

total.description: Total listings matching the upstream query.

limit.description: Batch size override. When omitted or 0, enqueues a full kickoff job. When > 0, enqueues a single limited batch (capped at `FEMA_ENRICH_BATCH_SIZE`).

dataset_slug.description: Optional dataset filter (e.g. `stellar`, `beaches`). Omit to process all datasets.

stale_estimate.description: Approximate count of listings missing flood zone enrichment.

get.description: Returns `{"status":"ok"}`. No auth required. Used by load balancers and container orchestrators.
Pings the primary PostgreSQL connection with a 3-second timeout. Returns PostGIS version on success. Returns 503 when the database is unreachable.

Returns a snapshot of the read replica selector state (healthy replicas, selected replica, fallback status). Returns 503 when the selector is not configured or the primary ping fails with fallback active.

503.description: Replica selector not configured or primary unavailable

get.description: Exposes Go runtime and application metrics in Prometheus text format. Scraped by Prometheus/Grafana in production. No authentication required.

post.description:
Authenticate and obtain a bearer PAT with `idx:full` abilities. Use the returned `token` in the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header together with `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=` for `/api/v1/*` calls.

**Test credentials (local / `make seed-admin`):**
- Email: from `ADMIN_SEED_EMAIL` in `.env`
- Password: from `ADMIN_SEED_PASSWORD` in `.env`

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's `id`, `name`, and `email`. Validates the `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header directly — **not** through DomainToken middleware, so no domain slug is required.

Get MLS listings for the resolved MLS feed (Bridge web collection when `filters` is set; merged Active/Pending Bridge RESO slice when `filters` is absent). Responses include top-level `pricing` and per-row `pricing_converted` when `ListPrice` is present and `include_pricing=1` is passed. **Collection cache:** 15-minute TTL applies per domain when **`filters` is absent**; any `filters` query parameter bypasses the cache and forwards to the upstream MLS. Standard Bridge/Spark query parameters are passed through. Responds with `X-IDX-Cache: HIT|MISS`.

parameters.name: X-Domain-Slug
parameters.description: Domain slug (alternative to `?domain=` query param). Must match a verified domain on the token owner's account.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: MLS dataset override. Must be enabled for the requesting domain.

parameters.name: include_pricing
parameters.description: When `1`, injects top-level `pricing` and per-listing `pricing_converted` from the crypto pricing reader.

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: Any non-empty value bypasses the cache and proxies directly to the upstream MLS web endpoint.

403.description: Forbidden — domain/token mismatch or dataset not allowed

get.description: Get a specific MLS listing by its web ID. Listing payload includes `pricing_converted` when `include_pricing=1` is passed and `ListPrice` is available. Response body is sanitized (expanded collections normalized).

parameters.name: listingId
parameters.description: The listing identifier (Bridge web listing ID)

get.description: Proxy to RESO `/Property` collection. All OData query parameters (`$filter`, `$top`, `$select`, `$expand`, etc.) are passed through to Bridge or Spark.

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Opaque pagination token (base64 JSON with top/skip) translated to `$top`/`$skip`

post.description: Compatibility endpoint that accepts a JSON body and translates convenience fields (`city`, `limit`) to RESO OData, then proxies to the upstream MLS.

get.description: Proxy to RESO `Property('<listingKey>')`. Supports `$expand` and `$select`.
Proxy to Bridge/Spark web agents collection. Standard query parameters (`limit`, OData `$filter`, etc.) are passed through. Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=`.
Proxy to Bridge/Spark web agent by numeric ID.
Proxy to Bridge/Spark web offices collection. Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=`.
Proxy to Bridge/Spark web office by numeric ID.
Proxy to RESO `Office` collection via Bridge or Spark OData endpoint. Standard OData parameters (`$filter`, `$top`, `$select`) are passed through.
Proxy to RESO `Office('<officeKey>')` entity by RESO OfficeKey.
Proxy to Bridge/Spark web open houses collection. Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=`.
Proxy to Bridge/Spark web open house by numeric ID.
Proxy to RESO `OpenHouse` collection via Bridge or Spark OData endpoint. Standard OData parameters (`$filter`, `$top`, `$select`) are passed through.

get.summary: Get RESO Open House by Key
get.description: Proxy to RESO `OpenHouse('<openHouseKey>')` entity by RESO OpenHouseKey.
Proxy to RESO `Member` collection (agent/member roster). Standard OData parameters are passed through. Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=`.
Proxy to RESO `Member('<memberKey>')` entity by RESO MemberKey.

Proxy to the RESO `Lookup` collection — retrieves enum/picklist values (field names, accepted values, display labels) for the active MLS dataset. Both Bridge and Spark expose this endpoint. Responses are cached per domain using the MLS lookup cache partition (`MLS_LOOKUP_CACHE_TTL`). Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=`.

403.description: Forbidden — domain/token mismatch or dataset not allowed

get.description: Proxy to the Bridge Public Records `/pub/parcels` collection. Returns parcel records with property identifiers, county data, and assessment linkage. Auth: `Authorization: Bearer <token>` + `X-Domain-Slug` or `?domain=`.
Proxy to Bridge `PublicRecord/Property('<parcelId>')`. Returns a single parcel with assessments and transaction linkage.
Proxy to Bridge public records assessments for a specific parcel. Returns year-by-year assessment values.
Proxy to Bridge public records sale/transfer transactions for a specific parcel.
Proxy to Bridge public records assessment collection (all parcels). Standard OData parameters are passed through.
Proxy to Bridge public records transaction collection (all parcels). Standard OData parameters are passed through.

post.description:
Hybrid MLS search: Active/Pending from PostGIS `listings` mirror when possible; Closed and special filters from live Bridge/Spark OData.

**Dataset:** `?dataset=stellar|beaches` (query param, not JSON body).

**Parsing:** Prefer JSON numbers/booleans. String numbers (`"250000"`) and booleans (`"true"`) are accepted. Empty strings omit a filter. Blank `statuses` entries are stripped. Aliases: `min_beds`↔`beds_min`, `max_beds`↔`beds_max`, `min_baths`↔`baths_min`, `min_sqft`↔`living_area_min`, `max_sqft`↔`living_area_max`. Pagination: `limit`/`skip` or `page.limit`/`page.skip`.

**Mirror filters:** `low_risk_floodzone` → `low_risk_flood_zone_yn`; `min_monthly_fees`/`max_monthly_fees` → `estimated_total_monthly_fees`. Geography: `city` / `county_or_parish` (GIS autocomplete + LIKE).

**Ignored (reserved):** `focus_areas`, `sort`, `sort_dir`, `geo`, `property_types` (array), and other legacy example fields.

**Response:** `{ results, hasMore, nextSkip }`. Mirror leg sorts by `modification_timestamp` desc.

See `docs/idx-api-bridge-proxy.md#search-endpoint-post-apiv1search`.

parameters.name: dataset
parameters.description: Optional MLS dataset override. Must be globally configured and enabled for the requesting domain/site.

schema.description: Implemented filters for POST /api/v1/search (Go SearchRequest). Reserved fields may appear in older examples but are ignored.

statuses.description: StandardStatus values. Empty strings in the array are stripped.

city.description: GIS autocomplete expansion + LIKE on city/county.

price_reduced_within_days.description: Forces live upstream leg when set.

focus_areas.description: RESERVED — not implemented; use city or county_or_parish.

sort.description: RESERVED — ignored; mirror sorts by modification_timestamp desc.

largo_price_beds_fees.summary: Largo — price, beds, flood, HOA cap

400.description: Invalid JSON body (`invalid search body: …`) or bad filter values

403.description: Dataset not enabled for site or token/domain not permitted

get.description:
Get GIS parcel geometry data for a bounding box. Returns GeoJSON FeatureCollection. Auth via `DomainToken` + `MLSAccess` (GIS access bypasses the feed check inside middleware).

**Example bbox (Tampa Bay):** `-82.8,27.9,-82.6,28.0`

parameters.name: bbox
parameters.description: Bounding box as `minLon,minLat,maxLon,maxLat` (max span: 0.35 degrees). Example: `-82.8,27.9,-82.6,28.0`

get.description: Get GIS parcel data scoped to a specific MLS dataset code. Passes the `mlsCode` to `gissvc.Fetch` for provider-specific county/data-source selection.

Fuzzy-match `gis_cities` rows (one row per city|county pair after county expansion). Used by search geography and typeahead UIs. Requires `pg_trgm` (Goose migration 00007). Auth: `DomainToken` + `MLSAccess` (GIS paths bypass feed check).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Verified domain slug (alternative to `X-Domain-Slug`). Not forwarded to MLS upstream.

200.description: Array of city|county suggestions (empty array when no matches).

get.description: Fuzzy-match `gis_counties` by display name or slug. Requires `pg_trgm` (migration 00007).
Per-dataset listing counts and `listing_sync_cursors` metadata for the local mirror. Includes all configured MLS datasets (e.g. `stellar`, `beaches`). Uses `domain.token` + `mls.access` middleware.

200.description: JSON stats payload per configured MLS dataset slug

post.summary: Run comparables, investor analysis, BPO, or home value
post.description: MLS comps engine (`internal/service/comps`). Modes **A–E**: sold + optional competition comps with adjustment grid. Premium modes: **`rent_hold_cashflow`**, **`flip_vs_hold`**, **`appraiser_simulation`**, **`bpo`** (14-line URAR grid + market-derived rates + renovation credits), **`home_value`** (BPO-style estimate + optional Google geocoding). Closed comps: live Bridge/Spark RESO; Active/Pending: PostGIS `listings` mirror. See [comps-api.md](comps-api.md). Optional `bpo_params`, `home_value_params`.

flood_zone_code.description: Provider-neutral flood zone (CSV allowed). Deprecated alias: stellar_flood_zone_code.

stellar_flood_zone_code.description: Merged into flood_zone_code when flood_zone_code omitted.

stellar_total_monthly_fees.description: Merged into monthly_fees when monthly_fees omitted.

mode_a_mls_radius.summary: Mode A sales comps by radius

mode_b_off_market_zip.summary: Mode B with off-market subject and zip scope

mode_d_neutral_keyword_scores.summary: Mode D with neutral keyword scoring

mode_e_neutral_keyword_scores.summary: Mode E with neutral keyword scoring

appraiser_simulation.summary: Appraiser simulation with BPO band and risk

403.description: Forbidden (invalid/missing token or domain not verified)

422.description: Validation error — missing required fields or invalid mode

get.description: HTML-dashboard JSON feed consumed by the operator monitoring page (`/dashboard/monitoring`). Returns the same live monitoring snapshot as `GET /api/v1/admin/monitoring`. Guarded by dashboard session cookie (`session_id`). **Deprecated:** use `GET /api/v1/admin/monitoring` for scripted or external access — it is equivalent and will be kept stable.

Returns the same live monitoring snapshot served by `GET /dashboard/monitoring/data`. Requires a valid dashboard session cookie (`session_id`). Useful for scripted health checks from an authenticated browser or curl with `--cookie`.

post.description: Enqueues a FEMA flood zone enrichment job for listings missing `flood_zone_code`. **Without `limit`**: enqueues a full kickoff job (respects `FEMA_ENRICH_BATCH_SIZE`). **With `limit` > 0**: enqueues a single bounded batch (capped at `FEMA_ENRICH_BATCH_SIZE`). Returns the stale listing estimate regardless. Requires a dashboard session cookie.

500.description: Failed to count stale listings or enqueue job

get.description:
Streams listing photos through idx-api (`internal/handler/images`). Backed by a local NVMe disk cache (keyed by SHA-256 of `listingKey/photoId`); cache miss proxies to Bridge or Spark `MediaURL`. Sets `Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable` and `X-IDX-Proxied-Public-Url` on both cache hit and miss.

**Path prefix is `/images/` — not `/api/images/`.** Clients typically route through the `idx-images` edge host; this documents the API-host path directly.

Auth via `DomainToken` middleware (same as `/api/v1/*`).

parameters.name: photoId
parameters.description: For Spark feeds: the `MediaKey` value from `listings.media` JSONB.

502.description: Image upstream error (origin returned 4xx/5xx or connection failed)
